title: Reproducible Builds, CI Gates, Artifacts, GitHub Pages, and Promotion · Code Recall
summary: A delayed publication review reconstructs reproducible builds, ci gates, artifacts, github pages, and promotion from revision, configuration, source bytes, document nodes, route manifest, rendered HTML, asset graph, validation report, artifact digest, deployment, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for immutable reproducible staged deployment pipeline after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causa…
objectives: Eliminate unstable order, paths, locale, time, random values, permissions, and environment leakage; use recorded source and tool identity and compare clean digests.
Pin workflow dependencies, minimize permissions, isolate untrusted changes, protect environments, retain logs safely, and separate build from deployment authority.
Build once, validate, identify, attest, retain, approve, and deploy the exact same immutable artifact instead of rebuilding.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

steps.title: Static-site publishing and Python Reproducible Build · changed case · Review Reproducible Build
steps.instruction:
review case — A review publishing team handles case 9546 during an offline-first field documentation build. Build deterministic Python evidence to promote one reproducible least-authority artifact through deployment and post-release smoke checks; reconcile content, routes, navigation, links, assets, feeds, sitemaps, output files, and artifact digests before approval; then insert malformed nested delimiters and retain later valid content with a located diagnostic. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A review publishing team handles case 2356 during a multilingual public-service handbook migration. Build deterministic Python evidence to promote one reproducible least-authority artifact through deployment and post-release smoke checks; preserve source spans, Unicode policy, trust classification, route base, contextual encoding, diagnostics, and accessibility decisions; then replace a trusted author fixture with untrusted raw HTML, unsafe URLs, and an active SVG. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Verify representative URLs, headers, assets, fragments, accessibility tasks, canonical origin, cache behavior, artifact identity, and rollback trigger after publication.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: A green deploy job proves the public site is correct.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Verify representative URLs, headers, assets, fragments, accessibility tasks, canonical origin, cache behavior, artifact identity, and rollback trigger after publication. Artifact under review: immutable reproducible staged deployment pipeline.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.

For separate evidence from confidence, render one trusted short page at the root, omit content authority, source spans, parser limits, route base, URL and asset reconciliation, contextual encoding, accessibility, clean-build comparison, deployment, rollback, recovery, and production transfer, then accept plausible HTML as publication proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Postdeploy Smoke, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

steps.title: Static-site publishing and Python Record what required effort · Review Postdeploy Smoke
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Postdeploy Smoke: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review publishing team handles case 7213 during a project-subpath GitHub Pages deployment. Build deterministic Python evidence to promote one reproducible least-authority artifact through deployment and post-release smoke checks; keep browser work pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of native filesystem, template engine, validator, network, GitHub, DNS, TLS, CDN, and host effects; then insert malformed nested delimiters and retain later valid content with a located diagnostic. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Verify representative URLs, headers, assets, fragments, accessibility tasks, canonical origin, cache behavior, artifact identity, and rollback trigger after publication.

Evidence target: Static-site publishing and Python Record what required effort · Review Postdeploy Smoke.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Static-site publishing and Python Record what required effort · Review Postdeploy Smoke, keep Postdeploy Smoke connected to executable Python source, parse, route, render, accessibility, artifact, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Verify representative URLs, headers, assets, fragments, accessibility tasks, canonical origin, cache behavior, artifact identity, and rollback trigger after publication.

Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Verify representative URLs, headers, assets, fragments, accessibility tasks, canonical origin, cache behavior, artifact identity, and rollback trigger after publication.
